creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: az
Date: Fri Aug 31 12:04:07 2012
New Revision: 303418
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303418

Log:
  - Update to version 3.2.10
  
  PR:		ports/170601
  Submitted by:	Eugene Grosbein <egrosbein@rdtc.ru>
  Approved by:	maintainer (timeout)

Modified:
  head/www/rejik/Makefile
  head/www/rejik/distinfo

Modified: head/www/rejik/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/rejik/Makefile	Fri Aug 31 12:03:03 2012	(r303417)
+++ head/www/rejik/Makefile	Fri Aug 31 12:04:07 2012	(r303418)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	rejik
-PORTVERSION=	3.2.6
+PORTVERSION=	3.2.10
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.rejik.ru/download/ \
 		http://bio3k.softboard.ru/uploads/arch/
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ PLIST_SUB=	INSTALL_DIR=${INSTALL_DIR}
 SUB_LIST=	INSTALL_PATH=${INSTALL_PATH} SQUID_USER=${SQUID_USER} SQUID_GROUP=${SQUID_GROUP}
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/redirector
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}
 
 OPTIONS=	BAN	"With banlists"	on \
 		DBL	"With DBL scripts"	off \

==============================================================================
